seoTitle: Millbrook vs Mills Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Millbrook and Mills Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Millbrook vs Mills Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Millbrook and Mills Lake.
heading: Millbrook vs Mills Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millbrook, Western Australia and Mills Lake, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mills Lake (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millbrook or Mills Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millbrook has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Mills Lake scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millbrook scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Mills Lake scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millbrook or Mills Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
